title: Šibenik, Šibenik-Knin — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Šibenik, Šibenik-Knin: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Šibenik is a city in Šibenik-Knin with a population of 46,332. A historic Dalmatian city with the UNESCO-listed St. James Cathedral, a stunning fortress complex, and access to the beautiful Kornati Islands and Krka National Park.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
